title: Add Dimension and Measure Selection for Aggregate in Streamlit App
story: As a data analyst using the Streamlit app, I want to select dimensions and measures for aggregation so that the query is automatically structured without manual column selection.
description:
Update the aggregate functionality in the Streamlit app to support dimension and measure selection. When a user adds a dimension, the column selection should be ignored in favor of the dimension/measure-based aggregation approach.

This provides a more intuitive analytics workflow where users think in terms of dimensions (group-by fields) and measures (aggregated values) rather than raw column selection.
acceptance_criteria: User can select dimensions for group-by operations
User can select measures with aggregation functions
Selecting a dimension overrides raw column selection
Aggregated results are displayed correctly in the app
ux_changes: New dimension and measure selection UI for the aggregate feature, replacing raw column selection when dimensions are specified.
middleware_changes: Query builder updated to construct aggregation queries from dimension/measure selections instead of raw columns.
